title: Ian Williamson: "I always wanted to see Apple themed novelty socks…" - Mastodon
meta_description:
Attached: 1 image

I always wanted to see Apple themed novelty socks from Marks & Spencer, a British food and clothes store - they have had Star Wars, Harry Potter, Doctor Who, the Muppets, and other franchises in the past - but I figured that, since M&S wasn’t a global brand (and AFAIK not at all known in the US), there was no chance. Now I’m not so sure. 

They generally come in packs of five, so I’d want a classic Mac, Finder logo, iPod classic, original iPhone, and the Apple logo (either white or six colours).
